name: setanim
summary:
SetAnim and all of its variants set the weight of an animation (or a node in the animtree) to a given value over a given time. They also set the speed at which the animation plays. All of the ancestors of the animation will also have their weight set to 1 over the given time so that the animation is visible. Each variant of this function has different behavior depending on the words in the function name:
"Flagged": These functions take an additional argument <notifyname> (first in the argument list) which is a string that is notified for every notetrack in the animation. For instance, if the string "runanim" is used, it would be typical to waittill("runanim", "end") to wait for the end of the animation. <animation> must be an actual animation and not a non-leaf node of the animtree.
"Knob": These functions turn the weight of any siblings of the animation to zero as the animation's weight is turned up. The effect is that after the given time, the animation is the only one out of its siblings that is playing. Note that the descendents of the siblings of the animation will not be turned off directly. (For this, use ClearAnim.)
"All": Works only with "Knob." Not available with both "Limited" and "Flagged" at the same time. These functions take an additional argument <root> (after the animation argument). <root> must be an ancestor of <animation> in the tree. This has the additional effect that "Knob" has on all nodes from the animation up to (but not including) <root>, so that this animation is the only one in its area of the tree which is playing.
"Limited": These functions do not change the goal weight of the ancestors of <animation> (If "KnobAll" is used, this means the ancestors of <root>). This means that the animation might not be visible if any of its ancestors currently have a weight of 0. However, when its ancestors' weight is changed, it will become visible.
"Restart": These functions cause the animation to restart. If they had been previously playing, without this they would continue from their current time.

args.name: animation
args.description: 1 : <animation> The animation or animtree node to change.

args.name: weight
args.description: 1 : <weight> Goal weight of this animation. Defaults to 1.0.

args.name: time
args.description: 2 : <time> Time to transition to this weight in seconds. Defaults to 0.2.

args.name: rate
args.description: 3 : <rate> Playback rate of the animation. Defaults to 1.0.

args.name: inner radius

args.name: max displacement
args.description: 5 : <max displacement> Approximate maximum distance each contact point will be displaced

args.description: 4 : <magnitude> The strength of the force.  1 = the default explosion

args.name: inner radius

args.name: magnitude
args.description: 4 : <magnitude> The strength of the force. 1 = the default explosion

summary: Attaches the player to an entity.  Any entity rotation is added to the player's view, allow the player to look around.  Rotating the parent entity/tag will not move the player's eye position, but only the player's view angles.  Thus, the player's eye position is locked in place, always directly above the parent tag.

args.name: left arc
args.description: 4 : <left arc> Angle to clamp view to the left.  Defaults to 180.

args.name: top arc
args.description: 5 : <top arc> Angle to clamp view to the top.  Defaults to 180.

args.name: bottom arc
args.description: 6 : <bottom arc> Angle to clamp view to the bottom.  Defaults to 180.

It is a script error for a playsound that does not have this flag set to get interrupted by another playlocalsound with notify, or for a playlocalsound with notify that does not have this flag set to interrupt another playlocalsound with notify. (Single player only)"

summary: The ground entity's rotation will be added onto the player's view.  In particular, this will cause the player's yaw to rotate around the entity's z-axis instead of the world z-axis.  You only need to call this function once.  After that, any rotation that the reference entity undergoes will affect the player.  Call this command again with undefined to turn it off.

args.name: ground reference entity
args.description: 1 : <ground reference entity> The entity used to rotate the player's view.

name: playerlinktodelta
summary: Attaches the player to an entity.  Any entity rotation is added to the player's view, allow the player to look around.  The player's eye position will remain fixed relative to the parent entity/tag.  Thus, pitching and rolling will cause the player's eye position to move. (But the player entity always remains vertical)

args.name: linkto entity
args.description: 1 : <linkto entity> The entity to attach the player to.

args.name: tag
args.description: 1 : <tag> The tag to attach the player to.

args.name: view fraction
args.description: 2 : <view fraction> How much the change in the tag's rotation effects the players view.  Defaults to 0.

args.name: right arc
args.description: 3 : <right arc> Angle to clamp view to the right.  Defaults to 180.

args.name: left arc
args.description: 4 : <left arc> Angle to clamp view to the left.  Defaults to 180.

args.name: top arc
args.description: 5 : <top arc> Angle to clamp view to the top.  Defaults to 180.

args.name: bottom arc
args.description: 6 : <bottom arc> Angle to clamp view to the bottom.  Defaults to 180.

args.name: use tag angles
args.description: 7 : <use tag angles> Determines how the player's view will be tilted.  'False' (default) means that the orientation of the tag when the player is linked will appear flat to the player.  Any rotation from that orientation will tilt the player's view. 'True' means that only a tag angles of (0,0,0) will appear flat to the player.  Any rotation from (0,0,0) will tilt the player's view.

name: setdeceleration
summary: Sets the deceleration for this vehicle.

args.name: deceleration
args.description: 1 : <deceleration> The deceleration of the vehicle in miles per hour per second

name: setacceleration
summary: Sets the acceleration for this vehicle.

args.name: acceleration
args.description: 1 : <acceleration> The acceleration of the vehicle in miles per hour per second

name: resumespeed
summary: Sets the vehicle to resume its path speed.

args.name: acceleration
args.description: 1 : <acceleration> The acceleration to apply to this vehicle in miles per hour per second.

name: setairresistance
summary: Sets the speed at which air resistance maxes out.

args.name: max air resistance speed
args.description: 1 : <max air resistance speed> speed at which air resistance maxes out (MPH)

name: setjitterparams
summary: Set the jitter parameters. Set everything to 0 to stop jittering. Vehicle ignores jitter parameters when on ground

args.name: range vector
args.description: 1 : <range vector> The jitter range vector.

args.name: min period
args.description: 1 : <min period> Minimum time in seconds to switch jitter direction. Default 0.5 sec

args.name: max period
args.description: 2 : <max period> Maximum time in seconds to switch jitter direction. Default 1.0 sec

name: setneargoalnotifydist
summary: Set distance near goal at which near_goal notification should be sent once.

args.name: dist
args.description: 1 : <dist> Distance to goal position

name: setlookatent
summary: Set the entity this vehicle will orient towards.

args.name: entity
args.description: 1 : <entity> The target.

name: setswitchnode
summary: Sets a switch node for this vehicle.

args.name: source node
args.description: 1 : <source node> The switch source node

args.name: dest node
args.description: 2 : <dest node> The switch destination node.

name: setmaxpitchroll
summary: Sets max pitch and roll angle for this vehicle.

args.name: pitch
args.description: 1 : <pitch> Max pitch angle

args.name: roll
args.description: 2 : <roll> Max roll angle

name: setspeed
summary: Sets the speed and acceleration for this vehicle.

args.name: speed
args.description: 1 : <speed> The speed of the vehicle in miles per hour

args.name: acceleration
args.description: 1 : <acceleration> The acceleration of the vehicle in miles per hour per second

args.name: deceleration
args.description: 2 : <deceleration> Deceleration. If not specified, set to be equal to half of accleration

name: setturningability
summary: If this is higher, helicopters can make sharper turns to match goal positions better.

args.name: turning ability
args.description: 1 : <turning ability> Between 0.001 and 1.0. Defaults to 0.5

name: setturrettargetent
summary: Set the target entity for this vehicle turret.

args.name: target entity
args.description: 1 : <target entity> The target.

args.name: target offset
args.description: 1 : <target offset> The target offset.

name: settargetyaw
summary: Set the target yaw direction for this vehicle. Goal yaw has priority over target yaw.

args.name: yaw
args.description: 1 : <yaw> The yaw direction of the target

name: setspeedimmediate
summary: Sets the speed and acceleration for this vehicle instantaneously. Direction will be toward the goal direction if there is a goal, otherwise the current direction.

args.name: speed
args.description: 1 : <speed> The speed of the vehicle in miles per hour

args.name: acceleration
args.description: 1 : <acceleration> The acceleration of the vehicle in miles per hour per second

args.name: deceleration
args.description: 2 : <deceleration> Deceleration. If not specified, set to be equal to half of accleration

name: setvehgoalpos
summary: Set the target position for this vehicle.

args.name: goal position
args.description: 1 : <goal position> The goal position

args.name: stop at goal
args.description: 1 : <stop at goal> Whether the vehicle should slow down to stop at the goal position

name: setturrettargetvec
summary: Set the target position for this vehicle turret.

args.name: target position
args.description: 1 : <target position> The position of the target

name: setwaitspeed
summary: Sets a the wait speed for for this vehicle in miles per hour.

args.name: wait speed
args.description: 1 : <wait speed> The wait speed for the vehicle.

name: setvehicleteam
summary: Set which team a vehicle is on.

args.name: team
args.description: 1 : <team> The team name. Must be either "allies", "axis", or "none".

name: setvehweapon
summary: Set the vehicle's weapon

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name>

name: setvehiclelookattext
summary: Set look at text for vehicle.

args.name: lookat text line 1
args.description: 1 : <lookat text line 1> The unlocalized look at text for this vehicle. Line is green and usually a name

args.name: lookat text line 2
args.description: 1 : <lookat text line 2> The localized look at text for this vehicle. Line is white and usually a type

name: startpath
summary: Starts the vehicle following this path.

args.name: node index
args.description: 1 : <node index> A node on the path to attach.

name: setyawspeed
summary: Sets the yaw speed for this vehicle.

args.name: speed
args.description: 1 : <speed> The speed of the vehicle in angles per second

args.name: acceleration
args.description: 2 : <acceleration> The acceleration of the vehicle in angles per second^2

args.name: deceleration
args.description: 1 : <deceleration> Deceleration. If not specified, set to be equal to acceleration

args.name: overshoot percent
args.description: 2 : <overshoot percent> How much to over shoot goal yaw by. Default 0.1

name: setwaitnode
summary: Sets a wait node for this vehicle.

args.name: wait node
args.description: 1 : <wait node> The node for the vehicle to wait at

name: startenginesound
summary: Start the engine sound for this vehicle.

name: stopenginesound
summary: Start the engine sound for this vehicle.

name: vehforcematerialspeed
summary: Force treads to scroll as if the vehicle was moving at the given speed.

name: enablegrenadetouchdamage
summary: enable grenade damage for damage triggers

name: bullettracer
summary: creates a bullet tracer from the start to end point

args.name: start
args.description: 1 : <start> The starting point bullet tracer

args.name: end
args.description: 2 : <end> The end point bullet tracer

args.name: force draw
args.description: 1 : <force draw> Set to true to ignore 'cg_tracerChance' setting and always draw the tracer.

name: getammocount
summary: Get the remaining ammo

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: bulletspread
summary: uses spread to return a new end position

args.name: start
args.description: 1 : <start> The bullet starting point

args.name: end
args.description: 2 : <end> The bullet ending point

args.name: spread
args.description: 3 : <spread> Amount of spread

name: getweaponclipmodel
summary: Returns the name of the weapon clip/magazine model used for the given weapon

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The name of the weapon

name: getweaponmodel
summary: Returns the name of the weapon model used for the given weapon.

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The name of the weapon.

args.name: model variant
args.description: 1 : <model variant> Model variant (0-15).

name: disablegrenadetouchdamage
summary: Disable grenade damage for damage triggers

name: isweaponcliponly
summary: Returns true if the weapon is clip only

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name>: (string) The weapon name for this weapon.

name: isweapondetonationtimed
summary: Returns true if the weapon has timed detonation (e.g. frag/smoke grenades)

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name>: (string) The weapon name for this weapon.

name: itemweaponsetammo
summary: Sets the ammo ammount for a weapon item entity (lying on the ground)

args.name: clip ammo
args.description: 1 : <clip ammo> The amount of ammo in the clip.

args.name: reserve ammo
args.description: 2 : <reserve ammo> The amount of ammo not in the clip.

args.name: alt weapon
args.description: 1 : <alt weapon> Pass zero to set ammo for the primary weapon.  Pass 1 to set ammo for the alt weapon.  The default is 0.

name: magicbullet
summary: Fire a 'magic bullet', from the source location towards the destination point.

args.name: weaponName
args.description: 1 : <weaponName> The name of the weapon

args.name: start
args.description: 2 : <start> The bullet tracer starting point

args.name: end
args.description: 3 : <end> The end point

name: magicgrenademanual
summary: creates a "Magic" grenade from an actor

args.name: origin
args.description: 1 : <origin> The starting point of the grenade toss

args.name: velocity
args.description: 2 : <velocity> The initial velocity vector for the grenade movement

args.name: time to blow
args.description: 1 : <time to blow> The grenade fuse time in seconds

name: magicgrenade
summary: Creates a "Magic" grenade from an actor.

args.name: origin
args.description: 1 : <origin> The starting point of the grenade toss

args.name: target position
args.description: 2 : <target position> The target point of the grenade toss

args.name: time to blow
args.description: 1 : <time to blow> The grenade fuse time in seconds

name: weaponclipsize
summary: Get the weapon clip size for the given weapon

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: weaponaltweaponname
summary: Returns the name of the weapon this weapon has for its alternate mode. Returns "none" if there is no alt fire. Subsequent alternate weapons can be retrieved by calling the function again with the new weapon names until it returns the original weapon.

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: missile_settarget
summary: Sets the target entity for a guided missile

args.name: target entity
args.description: 1 : <target entity> The entity toward which the missile will steer.

args.name: target offset
args.description: 1 : <target offset> A vector, giving the offset from the entity's origin toward which the missile will steer.

name: weaponclass
summary: Returns the class of weapon that this weapon is, such as "rifle", "smg", "spread", "pistol", etc.

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: weaponfightdist
summary: Returns the fight distance for this weapon

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: weaponfiretime
summary: Get the weapon fire time for the given weapon

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: weaponinventorytype
summary: Returns the way this weapon is stored, such as "altmode", "item", "offhand", or "primary".

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: weapontype
summary: Returns the type of weapon that this weapon is, such as "bullet", "projectile", "grenade", or "binoculars".

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: weaponmaxdist
summary: Returns the maximum distance for this weapon

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: weaponmaxammo
summary: Returns the max amount of ammo this weapon is meant to hold.  Stockpile only, not the clip.

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: weaponissemiauto
summary: Get whether this weapon is semi automatic

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: weaponstartammo
summary: Returns the amount of ammo this weapon is meant to start with when first given to a player.

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.

name: weaponisboltaction
summary: Get whether this weapon has a bolt action

args.name: weapon name
args.description: 1 : <weapon name> The weapon name.
